nasb.text: He was oppressed and He was afflicted, Yet He did not open His mouth; Like a lamb that is led to slaughter, And like a sheep that is silent before its shearers, So He did not open His mouth.

esv.text: He was oppressed, and he was afflicted, yet he opened not his mouth; like a lamb that is led to the slaughter, and like a sheep that before its shearers is silent, so he opened not his mouth.

cnv.text: 他被虐待，受痛苦的時候， 他並不開口； 他像羊羔被牽去屠宰， 又像羊在剪羊毛的人面前寂然無聲， 他也是這樣不開口。

ccb.text: 祂遭欺压、受痛苦， 却默然不语， 像被人牵去宰杀的羔羊， 又如在剪毛人手下一声不吭的绵羊。

csbs.text: 他被欺压、苦待，却不开口； 他像羔羊被牵去宰杀、 像羊在剪毛的人面前默然无声， 他也这样不开口。
